titleStmt.title: The Representative in Albania ( Jacobs ) to the Secretary of State, at Paris

div.head: The Representative in Albania ( Jacobs ) to the Secretary of State, at Paris
div.p: 303. For Secdel for Dunn. Received this morning from Albanian Foreign Office note dated June 3 signed Enver-HoxaEnver Hoxha, Prime Minister and Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Albanian regime. in his various capacities addressed Council Foreign Ministers charging Greece with having in violation of all human principles driven into Albania in most destitute circumstances about 23,000 Chams former residents northwestern Greece and requesting that Council of Ministers take urgent measures: (1)Bring about their repatriation; (2) arrange guarantees their civil, cultural and political rights; (3) restitution or indemnification their property; (4) punishment responsible persons.The Albanian note under reference was subsequently sent to the Council of Foreign Ministers through the French Embassy in Moscow. The note, which was circulated to the Council as document C.F.M. (46) 142, June 25, 1946, not printed, was not taken up by the Council. Additional documentation regarding the Greek-Albanian dispute concerning the Chams is printed in volume vii .
Note with my comments will be forwarded next plane scheduled here June 7.
Similar note handed French Chargé and assume also Soviet representative and probably to British representative Belgrade.
